title: Factors affecting the sources of finance
summary: 9609 AS — size, purpose, control, and cost factors in finance choice.
learningObjectives: Explain impact of amount and duration needed.

simpleExplanation.title: Which source fits?
simpleExplanation.summary: The right finance source depends on how much is needed, for how long, whether owners will share control, and the cost of capital.
steps: Purpose: fixed asset vs working capital.
Amount: small overdraft vs share issue.

sections.content: **Factors affecting finance** (5.2.3) leads into **5.2.4 selection**. Use **bullet factors applied to case**.
